Canister filters handle larger volumes, better filtration, quieter, more flexible, customizable, better media capacity than hang-on-back filters.
50-watt heater undersized for 20-gallon; recommended 75-100W; rule: 1-2W per gallon; maintain 76-82°F for tropical fish.
Fixed spectrum LEDs are affordable, simple; adjustable spectrum LEDs customizable, better for planted tanks but more expensive/complex.

Hemoglobin varies by ethnicity: African Americans/descent higher, Hispanic/Asian intermediate, Native Americans lower due to genetics/altitude.
Maintain balanced hemoglobin: eat iron/B12/folate-rich foods (red meat, seafood, greens, beans), exercise, hydrate, avoid smoking/alcohol, regular blood tests.

Arranging art: create focal point, visual triangle, mix scales, rule of odds, balance heavy/light, unify with theme, leave breathing room.
Choose art matching room colors using color wheel, consider style/era, mix textures/mediums, balance warm/cool tones, unify themes.
Artists to complement abstract art: Jackson Pollock, Willem de Kooning, Mark Rothko (Abstract Expressionism); Color Field Painting artists.
Eastern vs Western: Eastern energetic/preventive (acupuncture, herbs), Western evidence-based/treatment-focused (pharmaceuticals, surgery).
Eastern medicine treatments: bee venom therapy, gua sha, fire cupping, ear acupuncture, auricular seed therapy; efficacy varies.
Western medicine innovations: immunotherapy, gene therapy, deep brain stimulation, transcranial magnetic stimulation, virtual reality therapy.
Combining Eastern/Western medicine creates holistic approach: acupuncture for pain with Western diagnostics; lifestyle + pharmaceuticals for chronic disease.
User wants dinner inspiration; garlic butter chicken: season boneless skinless thighs with paprika/garlic/oregano/thyme, pan-fry 4-5+3 min, top with garlic butter.
